# Mind & Method Academy

> World-class business education, without the £30k MBA.

Mind and Method Academy is a UK-based business education company helping individuals and organisations build businesses. We run structured programmes covering the full path from intention to first revenue.

## Who We Serve

- Individuals: time-poor people with jobs and other commitments who want to start a business
- Organisations: universities, local authorities, government bodies, charities, prisons, and corporate partners

## Our Programmes

- **DIY Accelerator (Step 1)**: Self-directed online programme — we teach you how to build it
- **Done-With-You Programme (Step 2)**: 10-week high-touch coaching — we help you build and launch it
- **Done-For-You (Step 3)**: Full execution — we build and launch it for you

## About

Founded by Samuel Iremiren (MBA, MSc Economics), with 10+ years of coaching experience across three continents. Previously worked with Samsung on enterprise development.

Registered in England and Wales. Company No. 16932969. ICO Reg. ZC073024.

## Contact

- Email: hello@mindandmethodacademy.com
- Address: 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, WC2H 9JQ
- Website: https://mindandmethodacademy.com
